title: Ultimate Horror
description: This is a modpack with 100+ horror mods. If you're up for the challenge, then give it a go
body:
## Pack Overview 

This modpack is filled to the **brim** with horror mods. From **parasite infections**, to herobrine, all the way to a mod, that its only purpose is to scare you with creepy faces. This modpack is the **Ultimate Horror** experience.



## **How To Install**
To install **Ultimate Horror**, you're going to need the [**Modrinth App**](https://modrinth.com/app). So just click on the link, and then click on the "Download Modrinth App" button. It will download an installer, just run the installer and you have successfully installed the **Modrinth App**. Now, open the app, and click on the compass (discover content) tab on the left side. Now search up "**Ultimate Horror**", and click on the install button on the right side. Finaly click on the Library tab (the books), hover over **Ultimate Horror**, then click on the green play button. Congratulations you have successfully installed Ultimate FPS!

> **DISCLAMER** _I did not make any of these mods, so huge thanks to the creators._

# **MOD LIST** [**link to the mods list**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ultimate-horror/version/2.0.0)

**_Im too lazy to type 150 mod names, and authors..._**

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d44f0d8096bcdee781cfaf005cd450f66eb875a.jpeg)


Please consider checking out more our projects! [![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a5e529d275da4dac8326c4981b73f7e4b84d5e9.png)](https://modrinth.com/organization/eat-the-beast)
